title: onobrychis humilis subsp. matritensis
intro: Onobrychis humilis subsp. matritensis, also known as Spanish melilot or dwarf melilot, is a subspecies of the melilot plant, a type of legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is rich in isoflavones and has been used for its medicinal and health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic properties. The extracts from Onobrychis humilis subsp. matritensis have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as gastrointestinal issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and it is also believed to have a positive effect on cardiovascular health and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis humilis subsp. matritensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used as a natural remedy to promote overall well-being.
